name: com.gameframex.unity
description:
All-in-One Solution for Indie Game Development · Empowering Indie Developers' Dreams

GameFrameX Unity core package — the essential runtime and editor foundation for the GameFrameX framework. Runtime modules include EventPool (typed event subscription and dispatch), ReferencePool (object reuse to reduce GC allocation), TaskPool (async task scheduling and management), ObjectPool (generic object pooling), Variable and Property systems (typed variable abstraction for data-driven workflows), Extension libraries (Vector2/3/4, Transform, GameObject, SequenceReader helpers), Utility and Helper classes (common algorithms, data structures, logging, version management). Editor tools include PackageManager (scoped registry configuration and migration), BuildProduct and BuildHotfix (build pipeline with hotfix support), BuildWebGLTools (WebGL build optimization), MiniGame platform integration (domestic and international mini-game platforms, device OEM support), Welcome window, UpdatePackages, Inspector enhancements, InspectorLockShortcut, Cropping tools, and miscellaneous editor utilities. Plugins bundle native iOS extensions (GameFrameX native bridge, tracking authorization) and .NET libraries (SharpZipLib, System.Memory, System.Buffers, System.IO.Pipelines). Compatible with Unity 2019.4+. Docs: https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com

独立游戏前后端一体化解决方案 · 独立游戏开发者的圆梦大使

GameFrameX Unity 核心包 — GameFrameX 框架的运行时与编辑器基础模块。运行时包含：事件池（EventPool，类型化事件订阅与分发）、引用池（ReferencePool，对象复用减少 GC 分配）、任务池（TaskPool，异步任务调度与管理）、对象池（ObjectPool，通用对象池化）、变量与属性系统（Variable / Property，类型化变量抽象，支持数据驱动工作流）、扩展库（Vector2/3/4、Transform、GameObject、SequenceReader 辅助方法）、工具与辅助类（通用算法、数据结构、日志、版本管理）。编辑器工具包含：包管理器（PackageManager，scoped registry 配置与迁移）、构建管线（BuildProduct / BuildHotfix，支持热更新构建）、WebGL 构建工具（BuildWebGLTools）、小游戏平台集成（国内/海外小游戏平台、设备厂商适配）、欢迎窗口（Welcome）、包更新工具（UpdatePackages）、Inspector 增强、Inspector 快捷锁定、裁剪工具及其他编辑器杂项工具。Plugins 目录包含 iOS 原生扩展（GameFrameX 原生桥接、Tracking 授权）及 .NET 库（SharpZipLib、System.Memory、System.Buffers、System.IO.Pipelines）。兼容 Unity 2019.4 及以上版本。文档：https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com
